name: is_part_supported
short_description: Checks if a part is supported with a vlnv
full_help:
is_part_supported

Description: 
Checks if a part is supported with a vlnv

Syntax: 
is_part_supported  [-vlnv <arg>] [-part <arg>] [-allowHiddenParts] [-quiet]
                   [-verbose]

Returns: 
1 if vlnv and part are compatible, 0 otherwise

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-vlnv]              VLNV to be checked for
  [-part]              Part to be checked for compatibility with given VLNV
  [-allowHiddenParts]  Allow hidden parts
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Part to be checked for compatibility with given VLNV
Suspend message limits during command execution
